functions.name: HBar
params: { label, value, max, formatted, color, icon, style }

{
  sectionsExport,
  sectionsImport,

  sourceLabel,
  partners = [],
  selectedPartner = null,

}

functions.name: Sidebar
params:
{

functions.name: Sparkline
params:
{
  data,
  color,
  height = 48,
  showMarkers = false,
  width = 260,
  style,
}

callGraph.callee:
clean
    .slice()
    .reverse()
    .map((d, i) => {
      const idx = clean.length - 1 - i
      return `${toX(idx).toFixed(1)},${toY(d.total_import_usd).toFixed(1)}`
    })
    .join

functions.name: VoteBar
params:
{

  labelColor,
  ja,
  nein,
  enthalten,
  abwesend,
  trackVariant = 'default',
  segmentColors,
  expandedDetails = 'all',
}
